mapper.sql: id, emp_name, emp_no, phone, reason, access_time, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM access_log
AND access_time >= #{startDate}
AND access_time < (#{endDate}::date + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND (emp_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR emp_no LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY access_time DESC
SELECT FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= CURRENT_DATE AND access_time < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' ORDER BY access_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO access_log (emp_name, emp_no, phone, reason, access_time) VALUES (#{empName}, #{empNo}, #{phone}, #{reason}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= CURRENT_DATE AND access_time < CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'
SELECT count(*) FROM access_log WHERE access_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND access_time < CURRENT_DATE
